text: We're hiring a Head of AI Enablement at Acme Corp! Looking for someone to build internal AI agents and automations to make our teams 10x faster. Strong Python, LLMs, and systems thinking required. DM me or apply at acme.com/careers. #AIEnablement #Hiring
author_headline: Co-Founder & CEO at Acme Corp | Building the future of work

text: Exciting ML Research Scientist opening at BigTech! PhD required, publications in top venues preferred. You'll be publishing papers on foundation model pretraining. Publish or perish culture. Apply now!

Our RevOps team is looking for an Applied AI Engineer to own our GTM automation stack. You'll build AI agents that handle lead scoring, email personalization, and pipeline analytics. We want someone who ships fast and thinks in systems. Fully remote, Series B startup.
author_headline: VP of Revenue Operations | Applied AI enthusiast
